Name for Proxy NDC CHAR 30
GNN FDB USAN Generic Name - Short Version for Proxy NDC CHAR 30
STR FDB Drug Strength Description for Proxy NDC CHAR 10
GCDF FDB Dosage Form Code for Proxy NDC CHAR 2
GCDF_DESC FDB Dosage Form Code Description for Proxy NDC CHAR 40
TYPE Insulin Type as Defined by the Model CHAR 50
COPAY Copay NUM 3
1 This file was first available starting with the 2021 data release. The file was retired after 2023, and is not available 2024+.
